name: calibre-library
title: Calibre Library
description: Search your Calibre ebook library by title and author
author: BrunoMonteiro

commands.name: index
commands.title: Search Calibre
commands.description: Search for books in your Calibre library

commands.name: add-to-library
commands.title: Add to Calibre Library
commands.description: Find ebooks on disk and add them to your Calibre library

preferences.name: libraryPath
preferences.title: Library Path
preferences.description: Path to your Calibre library folder (the one containing metadata.db)

preferences.name: searchPath1
preferences.title: Add Books
preferences.description: Primary folder to scan for ebook files

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
